summary: Successfully tested all bug fixes from iteration 2. Role-based access control is now properly enforced. HC users get 403 on admin endpoints, admin users can access all features. Dashboard filter and PDF exports work correctly with Authorization headers.
passed_tests: HC user gets 403 when trying to POST /api/supplements
HC user gets 403 when trying to PUT /api/supplements/{id}
HC user gets 403 when trying to DELETE /api/supplements/{id}
HC user gets 403 when trying to PUT /api/templates/{id}
Dashboard plan filter with empty string returns all plans
PDF export endpoint for patient plan works with Authorization header
PDF export endpoint for HC plan works with Authorization header
HC navigation shows only Dashboard and New Plan
Admin navigation shows all nav items including Supplements and Templates
Login flow works correctly for both HC and admin users
Plan creation page accessible to both roles
Admin can access Supplements management page
